promises.promise_text: Errtu will continue to seek the crystal shard Crenshinibon and try to possess it.
promises.evidence_quote_open: And Errtu had come so close to possessing it!

promises.promise_text: The wizards Eldeluc and Dendybar will discard or eliminate Akar Kessell after using him to kill Morkai.
promises.evidence_quote_open: Eldeluc smiled evilly.
promises.evidence_quote_close: He understood now that he had been no more than a pawn in their devious designs to rid themselves of Morkai the Red.

promises.promise_text: The barbarian tribes will unite and attack Ten-Towns.
promises.evidence_quote_open: ominous signs — empty barbarian caves, abandoned migration trails, and war drums — warn of imminent attack on Ten-Towns.
promises.evidence_quote_close: The horde entered the mouth of Bremen's Run just before midday.

promises.promise_text: Regis's ruby pendant has persuasive magical power.
promises.evidence_quote_open: But it is there - I see it clearly and know the legend of such a stone.
promises.evidence_quote_close: Ten-seconds passed and Kemp had not blinked.

promises.promise_text: Drizzt can summon a powerful panther ally named Guenhwyvar from the onyx figurine.
promises.evidence_quote_open: Bruenor asks after Guenhwyvar and Drizzt produces the onyx figurine, explaining the panther needs rest.
promises.evidence_quote_close: the great panther was beside him.

promises.promise_text: Bruenor dreams of reclaiming the lost dwarven kingdom of Mithril Hall.
promises.evidence_quote_open: In this place he found his dreams, and ever they took him back to his ancient home.

promises.promise_text: The sentient crystal shard Crenshinibon will manipulate Akar Kessell for its own evil purposes.
promises.evidence_quote_open: His bedfellow was the crystal shard, Crenshinibon, an ancient, sentient relic that had waited throughout ages uncounted for one such as he to appear in the bowl.
promises.evidence_quote_close: an ancient, sentient relic that had waited throughout ages uncounted for one such as he to appear in the bowl.

promises.promise_text: Kessell vows never to be a pawn again and will seek power and respect.
promises.evidence_quote_open: vowing he will never again be a stooge
promises.evidence_quote_close: I am Akar Kessell, Tyrant of Icewind Dale!

promises.promise_text: Akar Kessell will gather an army and become a tyrant threatening Icewind Dale.
promises.evidence_quote_open: Kessell decides he needs a castle and, guided unknowingly by Crenshinibon, discovers a duplicate crystal and intuitively understands his role in using it.
promises.evidence_quote_close: Kessell's army swept around Lac Dinneshere and crashed into Caer-Konig.

promises.promise_text: Bruenor will create an enchanted warhammer of great power.
promises.evidence_quote_open: The image of a two-headed hammer hidden within the block of mithril had come to Bruenor in a dream earlier that week.
promises.evidence_quote_close: the warhammer flared with magic and captured every speck of diamond dust.

promises.promise_text: Drizzt will train Wulfgar in combat.
promises.evidence_quote_open: Bruenor admits he needs Drizzt to train Wulfgar before winter.
promises.evidence_quote_close: As soon as the sun dropped below the horizon, they took to their work.

promises.promise_text: Wulfgar intends to undertake a dangerous personal mission related to his tribal heritage.
promises.evidence_quote_open: "Of adventures and an unfulfilled vow," Wulfgar said mysteriously.
promises.evidence_quote_close: slayer of the frost giant chieftain, Biggrin; and dragon's bane!

promises.promise_text: King Heafstaag will recover from his wounds and return to threaten the heroes.
promises.evidence_quote_open: Mortally wounded, Heafstaag is caught by loyal tribesmen who sacrifice themselves to carry their king to safety.
promises.evidence_quote_close: Though he walked among giants and trolls, the proud barbarian king's stature was not diminished.

promises.promise_text: Errtu will betray Kessell and attempt to take the crystal shard for himself.
promises.evidence_quote_open: Errtu accepts with a wicked bow.

promises.promise_text: A band of verbeeg giants hidden in a lair near Ten-Towns will be discovered and confronted by the heroes.
promises.evidence_quote_open: A band of verbeeg led by a frost giant slips into a secret lair near Ten-Towns under cover of a violent storm, carrying weapons and supplies for Akar Kessell's army.
promises.evidence_quote_close: the monster suddenly staggered and fell dead.

promises.promise_text: Regis will enter Cryshal-Tirith as an emissary to deceive Kessell with the ruby pendant.
promises.evidence_quote_open: Cassius reveals his plan: send Regis as emissary to charm Kessell.
promises.evidence_quote_close: the eyes of the wizard no longer blinked.

promises.promise_text: Drizzt will attempt to assassinate Akar Kessell.
promises.evidence_quote_open: unnerved by the wizard's power over normally independent tribes, resolves to attempt to kill him before retreating to rest.
promises.evidence_quote_close: I am Drizzt Do'Urden, and I have come to kill you.

promises.promise_text: Drizzt and Bruenor will journey to find the lost Mithril Hall.
promises.evidence_quote_open: Drizzt promises to accompany Bruenor to Mithril Hall in the spring.

promises.promise_text: The Pasha Pook's agents will eventually find Regis and attempt to reclaim the stolen ruby.
promises.evidence_quote_open: Regis recalls his Calimport career cut short when he stole one ruby from the Pasha Pook's collection.
promises.evidence_quote_close: But it was the weapon sheathed on his hip that Regis's gaze locked on: an emerald-hilted dagger. Artemis Entreri.

promises.promise_text: The political discord in Ten-Towns will prevent a unified defense against the invasion.
promises.evidence_quote_open: Bruenor's exit shakes some spokesmen but Kemp's influence prevails; the council ends without decisive action, Regis discredited, and only a toothless public warning is issued.
promises.evidence_quote_close: The majority voted against the alliance, and the council adjourned without taking any decisive action.

promises.promise_text: Kessell can communicate and observe through magic mirrors, posing a surveillance threat.
promises.evidence_quote_open: A gaunt mage's face appears in the mirror demanding Biggrin's presence.

promises.promise_text: The gem-encrusted scimitar from the dragon's hoard has magical properties.
promises.evidence_quote_open: Drizzt uncovers a gem-encrusted scimitar of extraordinary craftsmanship and claims it.
promises.evidence_quote_close: The enchanted blade of Drizzt's scimitar bit into Errtu's knee, and an icy chill spread through the demon's body, extinguishing the flames.
